heading:
Craftsman
Mentality
narrative: I like to think of myself as a craftsman in this digital age. Someone who takes pride in producing quality work tailored for each client. Where the enjoyment that clients and users derives from the final product is a reward in itself.

A master craftsman chooses his tools well, even his projects deliberately, and brings years of distilled experience into the job. The work is not rushed. And when finished, embodies an elegant simplicity. Quality visible in the smallest details. Being a master craftsman may be an ideal, especially in this field, but it's an ideal that I'm trying to live by.

Decades in this craft has taught me one consistent lesson: don't chase hype. Good and reliable tools, tested practices, and sound principles outlast every buzzword cycle. Simplicity, performance, and maintainability win every time.
